scripts.dev: npm run check-env && npm run check-config && concurrently -n api,worker,mobile -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:worker" "npm run dev:mobile"
scripts.dev:backend: npm run check-env && npm run check-config && npm --prefix backend/src run start
scripts.dev:worker: npm run check-env && npm --prefix backend/src run worker
scripts.dev:mobile: npm run check-config && npm --prefix mobile-app/src run start
